>>Description:
>
> The hardware of my workstation is based on ASUS P5LD2-SE motherboard. If =
I install 2x512MB of RAM, the dmesg says that installed memory is 1GB but a=
vailable only 512MB. On the other hand, if I install 4x512MB the message is=
 2GB installed and 1GB available. Always the half of the memory installed. =
The motherboard has four DIMMs, all filled.
>
> Many thanks in advance for any help.

Unfortunately this is PCBSD, so you should talk to the PCBSD folks
about this issue.
Thanks,
-Garrett
